_comment: Expected Windsurf output for canonical/full-featured.json. Tests: (1) before_tool_execute + shell -> pre_run_command with provider_data.windsurf rendered (show_output, working_directory); (2) MCP matcher -> pre_mcp_tool_use; (3) session_start -> unsupported (dropped with warning). Windsurf does not support: timeout, env, platform overrides, structured output, or session lifecycle events.
_warnings: Hook 1: timeout field dropped — Windsurf does not support configurable timeouts
Hook 1: platform overrides dropped — Windsurf does not support per-OS command overrides (platform_commands capability degraded: warn)
Hook 1: env field dropped — Windsurf does not support custom environment variables (custom_env capability degraded: warn)
Hook 1: cwd field mapped to working_directory via provider_data — Windsurf requires absolute paths
Hook 1: provider_data.windsurf.show_output and working_directory rendered into native format

Hook 2: MCP matcher {server: 'github', tool: 'create_issue'} mapped to pre_mcp_tool_use — Windsurf pre_mcp_tool_use fires for ALL MCP tools, not filtered by server/tool. The matcher granularity is lost.
Hook 2: timeout field dropped — Windsurf does not support configurable timeouts
Hook 3: session_start is not supported by Windsurf — hook excluded
